creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to hlh from comment #137)
Hi for 5209 and 5229 you do not want full power in bus power_on, it breaks, and might also break for RTS522A but I have only access to 5209 and 5229. I switched calls in #attachment 214840, and you switched implementation in git instead.  Now it seems you have switched them back, and it breaks at least for 5209 and 5229
